nasb.text: “Those slain by the Lord on that day will be from one end of the earth to the other. They will not be lamented, gathered or buried; they will be like dung on the face of the ground.

esv.text: “And those pierced by the Lord on that day shall extend from one end of the earth to the other. They shall not be lamented, or gathered, or buried; they shall be dung on the surface of the ground.

cnv.text: 到那日，從地的這邊到地的那邊，都必有被耶和華刺死的人；必沒有人為他們悲哀，沒有人收殮他們、埋葬他們；他們都必在地面上成為糞肥。

ccb.text: 到那日，遍地都是被耶和华杀戮的人，无人哀悼、收殓和埋葬，他们好像地上的粪便。
